column2: CAA Officer Does Not Accept Compromised Classified Evidence
column3: ['The user logs in as a CAA officer with access to classified MOD evidence under Cap 722h / JSP 440. ', 'The user presents compromised classified MOD evidence to the CAA. ']
column4: ["The system confirms the user's identity and grants them access to the classified MOD evidence. ", 'The CAA does not accept the compromised classified MOD evidence without first verifying its integrity and ensuring it is not compromised. ']
